name: revit_manage_spaces_zones
description: Lists, creates, or updates MEP spaces and zones on a specified level and phase.

level_id.description: Element id of the target level

phase_id.description: Element id of the target phase

space_ids.description: Space element ids to add or remove from a zone

notes: Current command uses MainForm; MCP wrapper should call DataManager/SpaceManager/ZoneManager directly.
